data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for multi-page forms with progress saving. While the linked use case mentions that a patient can complete 80% of the form and return later, it does not provide sufficient evidence that the form is indeed multi-page or that progress saving is implemented in a way that meets the requirement. The evidence only describes a single form scenario without confirming the multi-page aspect, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of multi-page forms.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the multi-page form functionality.
